title: Our Products
subtitle: Explore our curated collection of authentic Himalayan art and sacred items

thangka.title: Thangka Art
thangka.description: Authentic hand-painted Thangka artworks from Nepal, each piece rich with spiritual symbolism and traditional craftsmanship.

soundBowls.title: Sound Bowls
soundBowls.description: Experience the healing power of artisan-crafted Tibetan singing bowls, meticulously engraved for meditation and sound therapy.

sacredItems.title: Sacred Items
sacredItems.description: Discover meaningful sacred objects and spiritual artifacts, each carefully sourced from experienced Nepalese artisans.
